where.if: AND (m.member_nm ILIKE '%' || #{kw} || '%' OR m.login_id ILIKE '%' || #{kw} || '%' OR c.coupon_nm ILIKE '%' || #{kw} || '%' OR c.coupon_cd ILIKE '%' || #{kw} || '%')

mapper.select: SELECT /* base.ec.pm :: PmCouponIssue :: selectById */ ci.* , c.coupon_nm, c.coupon_cd, c.coupon_type_cd , c.discount_rate, c.discount_amt, c.valid_from, c.valid_to , m.member_nm, m.login_id AS member_email, m.member_phone , cd_ct.code_label AS coupon_type_cd_nm FROM pm_coupon_issue ci LEFT JOIN pm_coupon c ON c.coupon_id = ci.coupon_id LEFT JOIN mb_member m ON m.member_id = ci.member_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_ct ON cd_ct.code_grp = 'COUPON_TYPE' AND cd_ct.code_value = c.coupon_type_cd WHERE ci.issue_id = #{id}
SELECT COUNT(ci.*) /* base.ec.pm :: PmCouponIssue :: selectPageCount */ FROM pm_coupon_issue ci LEFT JOIN pm_coupon c ON c.coupon_id = ci.coupon_id LEFT JOIN mb_member m ON m.member_id = ci.member_id

SELECT /* base.ec.pm :: PmCouponIssue :: selectByMemberId */ ci.* , c.coupon_nm, c.coupon_cd, c.coupon_type_cd , c.discount_rate, c.discount_amt, c.valid_from, c.valid_to , cd_ct.code_label AS coupon_type_cd_nm FROM pm_coupon_issue ci LEFT JOIN pm_coupon c ON c.coupon_id = ci.coupon_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_ct ON cd_ct.code_grp = 'COUPON_TYPE' AND cd_ct.code_value = c.coupon_type_cd WHERE ci.member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY ci.issue_date DESC
